data.description: You sense the location of all non-magical living things of a specified kind within range. You must specify the type of animal or plant you want to locate, such as allosaurus or gnarled tree. The spell doesn't reveal how far away the creatures are.

Time: that familiar you.

Casting a Spell allows you to locate a creature of a specific kind within 1,000 feet as a 1-action spell. The spell lasts until the end of your next turn and can be dismissed with an action. If the target is in different form, you must use an action to control it. You can't move objects or manipulate the contents of containers using this spell, but you can use it to locate creatures within a 30-foot radius.

1action
Time:
Range:
Self
Components: M(a twig)
V,S, farked
Cancentration, up to minutes
The duration entry describes how long the spell effect lasts.

1 action
Time:
Range:
Touch
Components: M(a of V,S, pinch dirt)
Duration: 1 hour
You touch a willing creature to shelter it in magical armor. Until the spell ends, the target has an armor class of 13 + your spellcasting ability modifier.
Create a Ethereal hand to deliver or retrieve a small object.
A magic circle spell creates a barrier to protect you and your allies from specific types of creatures.

A creature cannot willingly use nonmagical means to teleport or travel interplanarly if it is within a cylinder. The creature must succeed a saving throw on Charisma to do so, with disadvantage applied if the target is within the cylinder.
